name: Southern Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pan drippings; from cooked turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the turkey giblets in salted water for 45 minutes.
2. Pour off the water and set the giblets aside to cool.
3. When cooled, chop the giblets.
4. In a large saucepan, combine the broth, margarine, onions, celery, and poultry seasoning.
5. Bring to a boil for 15 minutes.
6. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
7. Grease a large baking pan with margarine.
8. Crumble the cornbread finely into the pan.
9. Tear the white bread into small pieces and mix it with the crumbled cornbread by hand.
10. Add the eggs, pepper, and half of the chopped giblets to the mixture and stir well by hand.
11. Pour the boiling broth over the cornbread mixture and stir thoroughly, adding the remaining giblets.
12. Bake for about an hour, basting occasionally with pan drippings.
13. Serve the stuffing with gravy made from the remaining pan drippings and turkey.
